const yuvaraj = {
  role      : "Frontend Engineer @ Truedune Beauty",
  location  : "Bengaluru, India",

  shipped   : {

    web     : "10+ products shipped",

  offscreen : {
    gaming  : ["Gran Turismo 7", "Valorant"],
    setup   : ["PC", "PS5"],
    motto   : "ship during the week, race on weekends",
  },
};
